name: Isekai Guild
detailed_description:
Build your guild. Shape your destiny in another world.

Isekai Guild is an anime-style guild management RPG where you lead a group of adventurers in the fantasy world of Vastena. Reincarnated as Hikaru Sato, a former executive with sharp negotiation skills, you’ll rebuild a fallen guild from scratch — recruit heroes, assign quests, manage resources, and uncover the forgotten legend of the Scarlet Eyes.

Core Gameplay

  • Manage and expand your guild: Build new rooms, decorate facilities, and upgrade your headquarters to attract powerful adventurers.

  • Strategic missions: Assign teams to quests with turn-based outcomes based on their rank, stats, and synergy.

  • Dynamic relationships: Interact with members through a visual novel system, unlocking storylines, loyalty events, and moral choices that affect the guild’s reputation.

  • Reputation & economy system: Trade with merchants, balance finances, and decide whether your guild becomes heroic… or infamous.

  • Living world: Follow local and world news that influence available quests, politics, and story branches.

Features

  • Deep management simulation with RPG progression.

  • Beautiful anime-inspired 2D characters set in 3D environments.

  • Narrative choices that shape your path and relationships.

  • Original soundtrack and worldbuilding by the Time Hunters team.

short_description: Reincarnated in another world, you’ll rebuild a forgotten guild, recruit adventurers, and uncover ancient secrets. Every choice shapes your destiny in this anime-style strategy RPG.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Mínimo:
  • SO: Windows 10
  • Procesador: Intel Core i5-2500 / AMD FX-6300
  • Memoria: 8 GB de RAM
  • Gráficos: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 Ti / AMD Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: Versión 11
  • Almacenamiento: 4 GB de espacio disponible
  • Tarjeta de sonido: DirectX-compatible
  • Notas adicionales: Keyboard and mouse required.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recomendado:
  • SO: Windows 10/11 64-bit
  • Procesador: Intel Core i5-9600K / AMD Ryzen 5 3600
  • Memoria: 16 GB de RAM
  • Gráficos: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660 Super / AMD Radeon RX 580
  • DirectX: Versión 12
  • Almacenamiento: 4 GB de espacio disponible
  • Tarjeta de sonido: DirectX-compatible
  • Notas adicionales: Keyboard and mouse required. SSD recommended for faster load times.

content_descriptors.notes: This game contains mild fantasy violence and stylized combat with no blood or gore. Some characters feature anime-inspired outfits and light suggestive themes typical of the fantasy genre, but there is no explicit sexual or violent content.
